# QuintessenceLabs Sits at the Intersection of Quantum & Cyber
## Your Quantum Transformation Begins Today
Our product portfolio and strong technical partnerships deliver broad security capabilities for the strongest security posture, today and tomorrow
[ Learn More ](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/products#different)
## Extend Your Encryption to Quantum & Beyond
QuintessenceLabs quantum-enabled solutions integrate with today’s encryption technologies.
### What Differentiates Us?
### We Quantum Enable OEM Solution Partners
### We Seed Solutions With True Quantum Entropy
### We Enable You to be Crypto Agile Today
## Trusted Security Foundation® (TSF®)
**Tackle the toughest key management challenges with the TSF key and policy manager.**
  * Centralized and vendor-neutral encryption key management solution
  * Designed to easily address the toughest challenges in key management
  * PQC Crypto-Agile Key Management supporting the latest NIST Quantum Resistant Algorithms
  * Common Criteria Certified


[Learn More](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/PDFs/QuintessenceLabs-TSF-Family-Product-Sheet.pdf)
![TSF2](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hs-fs/hubfs/TSF2.png?width=800&height=700&name=TSF2.png)
## qOptica™ 100 Quantum Key Distribution (QKD)
**Our continuous variable quantum key distribution (CV-QKD) technology is the most secure means of distributing keys, protected by the laws of physics.**
  * Point-to-point protocol that uses specialized hardware to share secret keys over an optical link
  * Secrecy of the keys is guaranteed by the laws of quantum physics
  * Offers CV-QKD technology with built-in advantages in terms of cost, form factor, and performance


[Learn More](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/PDFs/QuintessenceLabs-qOptica-QKD-Product-Sheet.pdf)
![QLabs-qOptica-hardware](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hs-fs/hubfs/QLabs-qOptica-hardware.jpg?width=800&height=700&name=QLabs-qOptica-hardware.jpg)
## qStream™ 100 Quantum Random Number Generator (QRNG)
**The qStream QRNG forms the foundational layer of all our security products.**
  * Derived from a quantum source: the ultimate source of true randomness
  * Instantly strengthens all crypto systems, full traceability
  * High performance QRNG, generating 1Gb/sec of true random number providing 100% quantum entropy
  * NIST 800-90B Certified as a true random entropy source


[Learn More](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/PDFs/QuintessenceLabs-qStream-Family-Product-Sheet.pdf)
![qStream2-1](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hs-fs/hubfs/qStream2-1.png?width=800&height=700&name=qStream2-1.png)
## qStream™ 200 Quantum Entropy Appliance
**The qStream Entropy Appliance ensures sufficient supplies of highest quality entropy throughout your network.**
  * Network attached QRNG appliance with qRand entropy management software
  * Delivers the highest quality random numbers at the highest speeds
  * Prevents performance degradation for applications using entropy


[ Learn More ](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/PDFs/QuintessenceLabs-qStream-Family-Product-Sheet.pdf)
## qConnect Quantum Safe Key Distributor
**qConnect provides quantum safe key distribution using NIST approved PQC algorithms and standard industry protocols.**
  * Quantum safe distribution of cryptographic keys protected by PQC algorithms and/or QKD platforms
  * Supports qConnect only or hybrid QKD/PQC key delivery and distribution
  * Supports ETSI 014, Cisco SKIP, and NOKIA Key Output protocols
  * Virtual Machine or Network Attached Appliance w/QRNG form factors


[ Learn More ](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/PDFs/QuintessenceLabs-qConnect-Quantum-Safe-Key-Distributor-Product-Sheet.pdf)
## qStream™ Entropy as a Service (EaaS) Solution
**The entropy as a Service (EaaS) platform makes quantum entropy available on a subscription basis to mitigate the risks associated with weak keys and low entropy randomness.**
  * Randomness and quantum entropy available on a subscription basis
  * EaaS Server distributes entropy to devices and various applications
  * Cloud-hosted software services


[ Learn More ](https://info.quintessencelabs.com/qstream-entropy-as-a-service-eaas-solution)
## qRand™ Entropy Management Software 
**qRand Entropy Management Software manages the entropy provided by qStream QRNG  
  
**
  * Delivers sufficient entropy levels, even in virtual environments, eliminating “entropy starvation”
  * Consolidates multiple entropy sources into a more secure single entropy stream
  * Distributes entropy to multiple target locations providing Entropy as a Service capabilities


[Learn More](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/PDFs/QuintessenceLabs-qRand-Entropy-Management-Software-Product-Sheet.pdf)
![qRand Entropy Management Software](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hs-fs/hubfs/qRand100.png?width=800&height=700&name=qRand100.png)
## qClient™ Software Development Kit (SDK)
**With qClient (100 SDK), developers can quickly integrate QuintessenceLabs’ key management and random number generation into any application.**
  * Vendor-neutral software development kit (client SDK)
  * Allows developers to effortlessly integrate key management and encryption applications
  * Supports industry standard APIs: KMIP, PKCS#11


[ Learn More ](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/QuintessenceLabs-qClient-Product-Sheet.pdf)
## qProtect™ Ultimate Data Protection
**The qProtect delivers powerful data protection for the most sensitive and critical assets, particularly when they are in uncontrolled environments.**
  * Safeguards sensitive and mission-critical data, especially in uncontrolled or high-risk environments
  * Provides a practical and robust solution for securing critical mobile data across its lifecycle
  * Enables “virtual zeroization” — the automatic secure erasure of one-time key material when data is recorded
  * Ensures long-term protection of confidential information, both today and in a post-quantum future


[ Learn More ](https://www.quintessencelabs.com/hubfs/PDFs/QuintessenceLabs-qProtect-Product-Sheet.pdf)
